assembly_metadata.label: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE OUTPUT - NOT FOR APPLICATION USE

resume_strategy: Position as a Platform Product Manager with verified product outcomes, role-relevant evidence, and Product OS proof used only as supporting context.

selected_headline.text: Platform Product Manager | Architecture, Reliability & Technical Strategy

selected_summary.text: Product leader focused on Platform Product Manager roles, with evidence across AI/ML, Model evaluation, AI workflows, Responsible AI. Selected proof points include LOG-THR-005, LOG-MRR-002, LOG-ARR-001. This draft uses Product OS as a supporting proof layer while preserving employer experience, metrics, and interview-defensible claims.

bullets.text: Led platform architecture and DevOps maturity work that improved throughput by 15% and made future AI capabilities more scalable.
Directed AI/ML-powered personalization in product discovery, contributing to +25% engagement and +20% MRR growth while building AI roadmap readiness.
Owned zero-to-one platform product strategy that generated Rs. 1M+ ARR, creating commercial context for AI-enabled product expansion.
Aligned cross-functional teams around roadmap governance, tripling delivery velocity and creating operating discipline for AI-ready execution.
Framed reliability as a product outcome in payment environments supporting 10M+ monthly transactions.
Owned MVP strategy and launch for core B2B platform modules, onboarding 15+ paying customers within six months.
Improved customer engagement to 83% and CSAT to 94% through targeting, segmentation, and multichannel integration.
Improved roadmap economics by reducing development cost 25% and time-to-market 15% through prioritization discipline.
Used behavioral data to re-architect discovery and personalization logic, improving session duration by 40% and strengthening workflow adoption.
Partnered with engineering and data science to evaluate ML personalization models and convert behavioral insights into product requirements.

gaps.current_evidence: AI product judgment, ML personalization, AI prioritization, and AI readiness evidence.
gaps.resume_mitigation: Use AI product and prioritization evidence without claiming unsupported GenAI production ownership.

gaps.interview_mitigation: Explain AI product decision quality and boundaries clearly.
